# Build a mission

Task-focused recipes for building a mission with MAST and the `sbs_utils`
library &mdash; "how do I do X".

- [Web pages](web-pages.md) &mdash; author browser pages with `//web` routes

!!! note "Being consolidated"
    GUI, comms, science, AI, damage, world-building, objectives, quests, and
    items/upgrades recipes are being gathered here from the older **Cosmos** and
    **Tutorial** sections into one cookbook.
